positive: A magnificent stylized celestial forest scene. Central composition featuring towering, abstract fractal trees with glowing crystalline bark and bioluminescent leaf clusters. The scene is composed of deep sapphire blue and rich indigo tones contrasted sharply with vibrant neon teal, emerald green, and gold accents. The aesthetic is highly detailed, psychedelic vaporwave meets Art Nouveau illustration. Include subtle, symmetrical cosmic dust particles and nebulae patterns swirling around the main flora. The overall feel should be mystical, fantastical, and highly graphic, ideal for screen printing on dark fabric. Strong silhouettes and clean lines are essential. Octane render, vector illustration style, high contrast, symmetrical, central subject.
negative: photorealistic, low quality, blurry, grain, noise, text, watermark, logo, copyright, messy, cluttered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, asymmetrical, messy composition
